'''Layn Wynest''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] crewperson on the ''[[Krayt's Honor/Legends|Krayt's Honor]]''. She often posed as the ship's [[Captain/Legends|captain]], despite the fact that the real one was [[Siqo Vass/Legends|Siqo Vass]]. It was believed they did this due to [[Humanocentrism]].

{{Char-stub}}
